clips.title: Last Orders
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, moody bar grade. A dimly lit cocktail bar at night, bottles glowing behind, warm pools of light. A medium shot framing a person from the waist up as they shake a cocktail shaker with flair, bar visible around them. A person in a rolled-sleeve shirt and apron. Warm bar light, bottle bokeh, 50mm, medium shot. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Case
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, detective grade. A dim investigation room, a corkboard of photos and red string behind. A medium shot framing a person from the waist up as they pin a photo to the board, studying it, room context around them. A person in a rumpled shirt and loosened tie. Warm lamplight, deep shadow, 50mm, medium shot. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: Soundcheck
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, warm grade. A small music venue before the show, amps and a mic stand, warm stage light. A medium shot framing a person from the waist up seated on a stool, tuning an acoustic guitar, head bent to listen. A person in a casual band tee. Warm stage light, soft haze, 50mm, medium shot. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Experiment
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, clinical grade. A modern laboratory, glassware and equipment on the bench. A medium shot framing a person from the waist up as they hold up a beaker of glowing liquid, examining it, lab context around them. A person in a white lab coat and safety glasses. Cool lab light, clean tones, 50mm, medium shot. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Market
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, vibrant grade. A bustling open-air market, colorful stalls of produce behind. A medium shot framing a person from the waist up as they hand over money at a fruit stall, market life around them. A person in a light linen jacket. Warm dappled daylight, lively bokeh, 50mm, medium shot. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Letter
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, contemplative grade. A cozy study by a large window, warm afternoon light, a desk and shelves. A medium shot framing a person from the waist up seated at the desk, writing a letter by hand, pausing thoughtfully. A person in a knit sweater. Warm window light, soft interior, 50mm, medium shot. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.
